hook.text: RUDIGER: AMAD IS LIKE AN EXPRESS TRAIN

beats.text: GERMANY DEFENDER CALLS AMAD A MAJOR THREAT TONIGHT
AMAD SCORED IVORY COAST'S WINNER AGAINST ECUADOR IN GAME ONE
GERMANY VS IVORY COAST KICKS OFF TONIGHT AT 21:00 BST

caption: Germany's own Antonio Rudiger has put a massive target on Amad Diallo ahead of tonight's World Cup Group E clash 🔴 The Real Madrid and Germany centre-back described Amad as 'like an express train' — the highest compliment from a defender of his calibre. Amad already scored the 90th-minute winner for Ivory Coast against Ecuador. Tonight, Rudiger must try to stop him. Germany vs Ivory Coast — 21:00 BST. Can Amad deliver again on the biggest stage? 👇 #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #worldcup #amaddiallo #ivorycoast #germany
